div.div: Complete the game in Honour mode.
Complete the game in Tactician mode.
Defeat Gortash in Wyrm's Rock without activating any traps.
Defeat Commander Zhalk on the nautiloid.
Multiclass into every class in one playthrough without asking Withers to change your character.
Recruit a hireling. You can befriend them or use them as cannon-fodder - we won't judge.
Complete the game in Classic Mode
Complete a full Extreme difficulty Blitz mission and extract in under 6 minutes.
Shoot off both arms on a Hulk and then extract while it's alive.
Kill a Charger with a resupply pod.
It's the only way to be sure...
Have 6 orbital barrage stratagems in the same place at the same time.
Fire at least 150 rounds in one burst, killing at least 10 enemies.
That which does not kill you...
Be injured in all limbs at the same time.
Kill 100 enemies using fire damage during the same mission.
Hold my primary, I'm going in!
Complete a full Hard difficulty mission or higher without anyone firing their primary or support weapon.
Provide assisted reload for a teammate.
Successfully complete a Hazard Level 5 mission from start to finish where no dwarf goes down and without ordering a resupply.
Ride the Drilldozer with three other dwarves and kill 15 enemies each without leaving.
Ride the Silicate Harvester for 30 seconds.
Foreign Objects In The Launch Bay
Successfully complete five Hazard Level 5 missions from start to finish in a row.
Promote all four Dwarves at least once.
Promote any three Dwarves at least once.
